feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Blue Bird's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: InfinityBlaze

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,426Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Dick Grayson was on the trail of something hot, and he knew it. A fringe cult that had started up recently and had made moves into Gotham, using force to take space in the abandoned corners of the city, reportedly using some kind of magic to do so. Alongside this there seemed to be an opposing cult that was trying to destroy this other faction. Dick wanted to be on top of this new threat to the city, and whilst on the cusp of a breakthrough was captured by the secondary cult on suspicions of him being a “Witch”. This catches the dark eyes of a being just starting to gain back his power.

entry.title: Aphelion
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,843Chapters: 4/13Kudos: 0

Summary: The thing about Lex Luthor's parties is that they are an exercise in applied pressure. Bruce Wayne arrives at a Metropolis gala with a device in his pocket and an exit strategy in his head. He leaves with neither, and a persistent frequency he cannot locate or turn off. Clark Kent is warm, direct, and completely unimpressed by power. He takes Amtrak. He tips well. He eats fermented shark with the serenity of a man at peace with the universe. Bruce builds a file. The threat assessment field remains blank. This is a problem. — A BvS divergence. Close third Bruce POV. Physics metaphors and slow burn throughout. Explicit in the back half.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Coupled in Crisis
entry.summary:
Author: soiguessimgaynow

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,783Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Clark and Bruce go undercover as a couple on the brink as Bruce tries to work out why a shady relationship coach’s newfound alliance with Dr Crane and Oswald Cobblepot. The pair get more than they bargained for, however, when unaddressed feelings cause them to question how much of their cover is faked and how much is something never of them are ready to admit

entry.title: Retrograde
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,820Chapters: 9/40Kudos: 39

Summary: A dangerous serial killer is on the loose. How will Bruce catch them when he can't remember what happened only moments ago? Bruce Wayne wakes with anterograde amnesia—twelve minutes of retention, then reset. He can't form new long-term memories, can't remember the last conversation, can't verify his own identity beyond what documentation tells him. Clark Kent loves him anyway. Loves him forty-seven times over, each reset a new choice to trust evidence instead of memory. But when renowned neuroscientist Dr. Harrison Wells is murdered using the same extraction methodology that killed twelve others, all evidence points to Bruce Wayne. Fingerprints on the equipment. DNA under the victim's fingernails. Nine hours of missing time he can't account for. Bruce doesn't remember killing him. But he doesn't remember not killing him either. Told in dual timelines—color chapters moving backward through Bruce's life with amnesia, black-and-white chapters moving forward through the investigation that preceded it—RETROGRADE is a psychological thriller about identity without memory, trust without verification, and what it means to be Batman when you can't remember being Batman.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Ever Slightly Out of Reach
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,466Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Three years after Superman died in neural drift, the UN Pan-Pacific Defense Committee has finally found language cowardly enough to say what they've always meant: loving Clark Kent makes Bruce Wayne unfit for duty. They think they can regulate grief away through proper documentation. They think love is a security risk that can be managed through committee oversight. They think the strongest drift came from discipline rather than devotion. Bruce Wayne is about to make their institutional cowardice very, very expensive.

entry.title: forever hold your peace
entry.summary:
Author: traderjoesss

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,809Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 44

Summary: He heard Clark shift in the chair — that particular adjustment, weight redistributing, the prelude to something. Bruce had catalogued Clark's physical vocabulary over six years without meaning to, and he knew, from the sound of it, that Clark was about to say something he considered important."I want you to be my best man."Bruce's heart did something it was not supposed to do. A single, traitorous beat off the rhythm — brief, a flicker, the kind of weakness he had not permitted himself in years. He was aware, with the cold certainty of a man who had made a study of Clark Kent's capabilities, that Clark had heard it.He set the tablet down.

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,975Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 138

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part One
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,101Chapters: 5/14Kudos: 3

Summary: Five months after disappearing, Aven Davis is running out of time—and out of places to hide. A volatile implant is the only thing keeping the queen inside him dormant, sending him straight into Metropolis and unexpectedly back into Clark Kent’s orbit.Meanwhile, Bruce Wayne’s search for Aven takes a devastating turn, revealing betrayals that put every step he’s taken under Weyland-Yutani’s gaze. With the clock ticking and danger closing in, all three men are pulled toward a collision that will decide whether Aven survives long enough to ever come home. (Please Read Ashes In The Dark part one and Two before Reading.)

entry.title: The never ending Cycle
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,568Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 68

Summary: "Wait..." A column of earth came between them, separating them. Bruce looked at him annoyed, no recognition in his gaze. Clark wanted to scream, "It's me. We were best friends. We were more. I loved you. I know you did too. I failed you. I left you when you needed me. I'm sorry. Please remember me..." Instead, as he had done so many, too many times before, he said nothing. Bryce was right to laugh at him. He was such a coward.   "Dad?" "Yes, Terry...let's go..."   Clark saw him turn away, his body doing nothing, his voice caught in his throat. It was Dick who took action. "We're here for you." "I already said I'm not enlisting..." "You're the Avatar!"

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,651Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 141

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
